rationale: The cited paper appears only as a single parenthetical example in the managerial discussion ("...increasing the effectiveness of its marketing actions (e.g., Ascarza 2018)"). The citing article does not use the cited paper's lift-versus-risk targeting framework, experimental design, measures, or specific findings in its model development, hypotheses, or empirical tests. The citation functions as broad background support for the general idea that better targeting can improve CRM effectiveness.
